---
title: "Statistics"
subtitle: Statistics Content List
description: |
  
categories:
  - Statistics
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 03/01/2022
---

# Contents List

## Basic

* 2023-11-07, [Variables](./2023-11-07-variable.qmd)
* 2025-12-08, [데이터 분석의 개념과 도구 생태계](./00-basic-concept.qmd)
* 2023-07-02, [연속확률변수와 확률밀도함수](./01-basic-theory.qmd)

### Probability Theory

* 2023-02-05, Set Theory
* 2023-02-05, [Basics of Probability Theory - Axiomatic Foundations]
* 2023-02-05, [Basics of Probability Theory - Calculus of Probabilities]
* 2023-02-05, [Basics of Probability Theory - Probability](../2023-02-05_probability/index.qmd)
* 2023-02-05, [Conditional Probability](../2023-02-05_conditional_probability/index.qmd)
* 2023-02-05, [Independence]
* 2023-02-05, [Bayes' Rule](../2023-02-05_bayes_rule/index.qmd)
* 2023-02-05, Random Variable
* 1111-11-11, Probability Distribution
* 2023-01-17, [Convergence in Probability](./2023-03-25_convergence.qmd)

### Transformations and Expectations

* 2023-02-21, [Transformation of Random Variables](../2023-02-21_transformation/index.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Expected Value vs Realizaed Value
* 1111-11-11, Variance
* 1111-11-11, Covariance and Correlation
* 2023-02-28, [Moment Generating Function, MGF](../2023-02-28_mgf/index.qmd)

### Exponential Family Distributions

* 2023-02-27, [Exponential Family Overview](./2023-02-27_exponential_family1.qmd)
* 2023-02-27, [Exponential Family (2)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family2.qmd)
* 2023-02-27, [Exponential Family (3)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family3.qmd)
* 2023-02-27, [Exponential Family (4)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family4.qmd)
* 2023-02-27, [Exponential Family (5)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family5.qmd)
* 2023-02-27, [Exponential Family (6)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family6.qmd)
* Discrete Random Variable
  * 2023-02-27,[Bernoulli Distribution](../2023-02-27_exponential_family/discrete_bernoulli.qmd)
  * 2023-02-28,[Binomial Distribution](../2023-02-27_exponential_family/discrete_binomial.qmd)
  * 2023-03-01,[Poisson Distribution](../2023-02-27_exponential_family/discrete_poisson.qmd)
  * 2023-03-01,[Geometric Distribution](../2023-02-27_exponential_family/discrete_geometric.qmd)
  * 2023-02-28,[Binomial Distribution (local)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family_discrete_binomial.qmd)
  * 2023-03-01,[Poisson Distribution (local)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family_discrete_poisson.qmd)
  * 2023-03-01,[Geometric Distribution (local)](./2023-02-27_exponential_family_discrete_geometric.qmd)
  * 1111-11-11, Hypergeometric Distribution
* Continuous Random Variable
  * 1111-11-11, Normal Distribution
  * 1111-11-11, Exponential Distribution
  * 1111-11-11, Beta Distribution
  * 1111-11-11, Chi-squared Distribution
* 1111-11-11, 

### Multiple Random Variables

* 1111-11-11, Joint Distribution and Marginal Distribution

### Point Estimation

* 1111-11-11, Estimation Methods - Method of Moments
* 2023-03-29, Estimation Methods - [Maximum Likelihood Estimation & Statistical Bias](../2023-03-25_MLE/index.qmd)
* 2023-03-24, [MLE & REML](./2023-03-25_RMLE.qmd)
* 2023-01-17, [BLUE (Best Linear Unbiased Estimator)](./2023-03-25_BLUE.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Estimation Methods - Bayesian Estimation
* 1111-11-11, Estimation Methods - The EM Algorithm
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Mean Squared Error
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Best Unbiased Estimators
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Sufficiency and Unbiasedness
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Loss Function Optimality



## Hypothesis Testing

* 1111-11-11, Hypothesis Testing
* 1111-11-11, Permutation Test
* 2023-01-16, [Normality Check](./2023-01-16_normality.qmd)

### Methods of Finding Tests

* 1111-11-11, Likelihood Ratio Tests
* 1111-11-11, Bayesian Tests
* 1111-11-11, Union-Intersection and Intersection-Union Tets

### Methods of Evaluating Tests

* 1111-11-11, Power
* 1111-11-11, Error Proabilities and the Power Function
* 1111-11-11, Most Powerful Tests
* 2022-12-28, [p-values](../2022-12-08-P-value/index.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Loss Function Optimality
* 1111-11-11, Multiple Testing
* 1111-11-11, Sample Size Calculation
* 1111-11-11, A/B Testing
* 2023-01-07, [ANOVA](../2023-01-07-anova/index.qmd)
  * 2023-01-27, [ANCOVA](../2023-01-27_ANCOVA/)
  * 2023-01-27, [repeated measures ANOVA](../2023-01-27_rmANOVA/)
  * 2023-01-28, [MANOVA](../2023-01-28_MANOVA/)

## Categorical Data Analysis

* 2023-03-17, [Categorical Data Analysis](./2023-03-17_categorical_data.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Introduction
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 2022-12-28, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 1111-11-11, 
* 2023-01-07, 
* 2023-01-27, 
* 2023-01-27, 
* 2023-01-28, 

## Regression

* 1111-11-11, Least Square and Simple Linear Regression
* 1111-11-11, Multiple Linear Regression

### Generalized Linear Models

* 2026-03-07, [GLM — t-test부터 로지스틱 회귀까지, 하나의 프레임워크로](./2026-03-07_glm.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Logistic Regression
* 1111-11-11, Multinomial Regression
* 1111-11-11, Poisson Regression

## Longitudinal Data Analysis

* 2023-03-23, [LDA (1) - Intro](../LDA/1_intro.qmd)
* 2023-03-23, [LDA (2) - Concepts & Covariance Models](../LDA/2_covariance_model.qmd)
* 2023-03-25, [LDA (3) - WLS & REML](../LDA/intro.qmd)
* 2023-03-25, [LDA (4) - Respiratory Infection Data Example](../LDA/intro.qmd)
* 2023-03-28, [LDA (5) - Epileptic Seizures Data Example](../LDA/intro.qmd)
* 2023-03-25, [LDA (3) - Weight Least Square & REML (local)](./LDA/3_wls.qmd)
* 2023-03-23, [LDA - Survival / Cox Model](./LDA/survival_lda.qmd)
* 2023-03-23, [LDA - CD4+ Cell Depletion](./LDA/CD4_plus.qmd)
* 2023-04-23, [LDA - EDA](./LDA/eda.qmd)

### Mixed Models & Longitudinal Analysis

* 2026-03-07, [로드맵 — 종단 데이터 분석 전체 현황](./00-mixed-model-roadmap.qmd)

#### Linear Mixed Model (LMM)

* 2026-03-07, [01 — 왜 Mixed Model인가 (GLM 한계, ICC, Fixed/Random)](./01-mixed-model-intro.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [02 — 모델 구조 (Random Intercept, Slope, 공분산)](./02-mixed-model-structure.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [03 — 추정과 모델 선택 (ML/REML, LRT, AIC/BIC)](./03-mixed-model-estimation.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [04 — 실무 예시 (AI Agent 개인화 + Airbnb)](./04-mixed-model-practice.qmd)

#### Generalized Linear Mixed Model (GLMM)

* 2026-03-07, [05 — GLMM 개요 (LMM 확장, Family/Link)](./05-mixed-model-glmm-intro.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [06 — GLMM 이진 결과 (로지스틱 혼합 모델)](./06-mixed-model-glmm-binary.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [07 — GLMM 카운트 결과 (포아송, 음이항, ZIP)](./07-mixed-model-glmm-count.qmd)

#### Generalized Estimating Equations (GEE)

* 2026-03-07, [08 — GEE (Marginal 효과, Working Correlation)](./08-mixed-model-gee-intro.qmd)

## Generalized Additive Models

#### GAM / GAMM

* 2026-03-07, [09 — GAM/GAMM (Spline, 비선형 종단)](./09-mixed-model-gam-intro.qmd)

## Time Series

* 2023-03-23, [Basic (1) - Stationarity Checking](./time_series/01_basic.qmd)

## Functional Data Analysis

* 2025-11-15, [Functional Data Analysis](./FDA/index.qmd)
* 2024-07-17, [RT-PCR 신호의 함수 자료 분석(FDA) 응용](./FDA/topics.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [FDA — 종단 데이터 맥락의 함수형 데이터 분석 및 Functional Regression](./10-mixed-model-functional-intro.qmd)

### 기법 비교

* 2026-03-07, [11 — LMM/GLMM/GEE/GAMM/FDA 비교 및 선택 가이드](./11-mixed-model-comparison.qmd)

#### ML / DL / RL for Longitudinal Data

* 2026-03-07, [12 — ML: Random Survival Forest, XGBoost, HMM, Lasso](./12-mixed-model-ml-longitudinal.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [13 — DL: LSTM, TCN, Transformer, Neural ODE](./13-mixed-model-dl-longitudinal.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [14 — RL: Contextual Bandit, DTR, Offline RL](./14-mixed-model-rl-longitudinal.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [15 — 회귀 진단: 잔차, 이상치, Bootstrap 추론](./15-mixed-model-diagnostics.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [16 — 층화 분석: nest+map, 교호작용 vs 층화, Shrinkage](./16-mixed-model-stratified.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [17 — 종단 EDA: Spaghetti Plot, 공분산 구조, 결측 패턴, ICC 사전 추정](./17-mixed-model-eda.qmd)

#### Panel Data Analysis

* 2026-03-07, [18 — 패널 데이터 (1): 내생성, Fixed Effects, Hausman Test](./18-mixed-model-panel-intro.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [19 — 패널 데이터 (2): Difference-in-Differences, 이벤트 스터디](./19-mixed-model-panel-did.qmd)

#### 연구 설계 Overview

* 2026-03-07, [20 — 연구 설계 대분류: 역학·임상시험 계보와 IT A/B 테스트](./20-mixed-model-study-design.qmd)

## Survival Analysis

* 1111-11-11,  Cox-Hazard Model
